site.title: ION Print & Promo | Election Campaigns
site.description: Election signs, flyers, postcards, door hangers and campaign promo printed locally by ION Print & Promo. Durable signs, bulk pricing and free Simcoe County delivery on orders over 100 signs.

hero.title: Election Signs & More
hero.imageAlt: Election lawn signs printed by ION Print & Promo

centreText.title: Be Campaign Ready!
centreText.description: Whether you are running for council, mayor, school board trustee or other elected positions, we can help you build a cost-effective campaign package that gets your name and message across the community.

featureImages.imageAlt: Coroplast election lawn signs printed in-house
Durable outdoor signage built for all conditions
Election campaign signage in the community

features.title: Election Signs Printed Locally
features.description:
At ION Print & Promo, we print signs in-house on durable corrugated plastic (coroplast) with weather-resistant inks. Our flatbed printing allows us to print directly to substrate, making us a smart choice for larger orders and competitive bulk pricing.

  • 16” x 24” (most cost-effective!)
  • 18” x 24”
  • 24” x 24”
  • 24” x 36”
  • 48” x 48”
  • 24” x 20” bag signs (min. order of 50)

Choose from popular election lawn sign sizes, with custom sizes also available. Send us your preferred size and quantity, and our team will be happy to help.

features.title: Election Sign Options & Local Support
features.description:
Signs can be printed on one or two sides, in one colour or more, with H-stakes and sign hardware available in bulk.

  • Printed on one or two sides
  • One colour (most cost-effective) or more
  • H-stakes & sign hardware available in bulk
  • Free sign delivery within Simcoe County on orders over 100 signs

When timing matters, local printing makes a difference. Avoid out-of-country online order delays and work with your community print team for real, in-person support.

features.title: Campaign Print Essentials
features.description:
Reach voters at the door, in mailboxes, at events and around the community. We'll help keep a consistent campaign look across signs, flyers and handouts, so everything feels connected and professional.

  • Postcards
  • Door hangers
  • Flyers
  • Business cards
  • Campaign banners & flags

features.title: Bundle Your Campaign Promo Products
features.description:
Build recognition and keep your campaign visible while canvassing, attending events and making appearances. Bundle promo items with your signs and print materials so ordering is easier and you save.

  • T-shirts & hats
  • Buttons & stickers
  • Pens, tote bags & magnets
  • Name badges
  • Event giveaways

cta.heading: Start building your campaign package today!
